title: Crispy Quinoa Salad
description: A nutritious and easy-to-make salad with crispy fried onions, quinoa, and a tangy dressing. Perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: 1. Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
2. In a pan, heat some oil and fry crispy onions until golden brown.
3. In a large bowl, combine cooked quinoa, Algerian salad, and crispy onions.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together tangy dressing ingredients.
5. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
